SUN ZHANG MECHWARRIOR ACADEMY Draconis Combine Affiliation only: Cannot have Combat Paralysis, Disabled, Lost Limb, Poor Hearing or Poor Vision traits The largest academy of its kind in the Inner Sphere graduating more than four hundred soldiers annually the Sun Zhang MechWarrior Academy (SZMA) is feared and respected throughout the Draconis Combine ad the rest of the Successor States_ Located on the world of New Samarkand, tne SZMA trains BattleMech_ aerospace fighter and armored infantry cadets (the latter being recent addition). The acade my is infamous for its harsh and bruta regimen; its cadets are steeped in bushido ad instilled with intense loyalty to House Kurita Combined with exceptional resources and the finest teachers available the SZMA produces some of the most respected and privileged soldiers in known space_ Tlme: years Attribute MInimums: INT 4 WIL SOC Attribute Thresholds: RFL +1 WIL +2, SOC +1 Tralts: Brave, Well-Equipped, Quirk /Loyalty to House Kurita Skllls: Academic Any Military Science +2, Martial Arts/Military +2 Blades +2 Fields: Basic Training Next Path: Advanced Individual Training Subpath (mandatory; part of this pass)
POLICE ACADEMY Law enforcement officers are needed on mos planets_ and so there always demand for trained police.
